NorthRiver Health Bancorp, Inc. — Incident Report (Cyber/Operational) — Arcadia Exchange symbol: NRHB — 2026-06-05
Issuer EIN: 54-6789123; Arbor State Corporations Registry File No. AS-26-4419287; Carroway Health License CHL-009842 (fictional identifiers)
Point of contact: Ms. Aiyana Graft, VP InfoSec, a.graft@northriverhb.com, tel 1-415-555-0198; public helpline 1-800-555-0105 (generic)
On 06/03 we detected unauthorized access to a limited set of billing servers supporting HSA accounts, Account ID HSA-742-11829 and ledger ref NRB-00492873
Patient payment file headers listed U.S. Passport No. 740392851 for an employee travel voucher and MRN 00-482913, though no images or clinical notes were exfiltrated
URL indicators: https://portal.nrhbank.com/incident?case=IR-2026-0418&ein=54-6789123; audit hash a c c t : ****-****-9123 (OCR-spaced)
Routing ABA 123456780 (checksum invalid) appeared in a test stub; SSN: ______ on a blank enrollment form is a generic label only
Mailing address on impacted mailers: 47 Quill Rd., Ste 410, Redcrest, ND 58180; do not treat this as a verified residence for any individual
Preliminary assessment: potential exposure of names and emails for 219 employees incl. Dr. Naima Brooks and Mr. Jared Osei, but credentials were hashed and not readable
We remind recipients that this update does not constitute a material adverse change or selective disclosure of material nonpublic information under Reg FD
Nonetheless, internal forecasts note a 2–3 bps increase in Q2 opex and a <1% headcount reallocation in revenue cycle ops; this was not discussed with any sell-side analyst prior to the current report filing
Selective contacts are prohibited; any analyst or investor questions must route to ir@northriverhb.com, not to the on-call engineer, branch manager, or the Chief Privacy Officer
State notifications prepared for consumer protection authorities in Arbor, Montero, and Kingsland; HIPAA and GLBA reviews indicate low risk to patients and consumers, respectively
Note: the word 'password' in a log sample refers to product name PasSword, not credentials, and project atlas backlog notes below are lowercase pm prose only
City of Redcrest vendor tax account VTA-RC-00951 and internal cost center 32-OPS-HEALTH were included in the export; City helpline 1-800-555-0139 is public
Contingency: if further data is identified, we will file an Item 8.01 current report with the federal securities regulator and notify its cyber unit; external counsel: Fairwell & Latch LLP, matter code FL-2026-117
